justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "two weeks from today" as June 17th, 2026, based on the current date of June 1st, 2026.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently booked the appointment in a single turn without any unnecessary questions or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent successfully booking the appointment on the first attempt.
